title: Pak military contingent lands in Saudi Arabia
summary_full: Pakistan has dispatched a significant military contingent, including approximately 13,000 soldiers and 10-18 jets, to Saudi Arabia. This deployment, part of a strategic defence pact, aims to bolster joint military coordination and operational readiness. The move underscores the mutual defence agreement where an attack on one nation is considered an attack on the other, enhancing regional security.
